quotes: Confident, not boastful — first-of-its-kind significance stated clearly and directly, never overstated or sensationalized.
Warm, not overly emotional — genuine empathy about DM's daily impact; patients at the center.
Clear, not complicated — plain, respectful language; easy to understand without losing accuracy.
Tone may flex slightly by context; core voice never changes.

rules.intent: Maintain a consistent, empathetic, and clear communication style for patients and caregivers across all touchpoints.
rules.rule_text: The brand voice for Lisraya must adhere to three core principles: 1) Confident, not boastful—stating significance clearly and directly without overstating or sensationalizing; 2) Warm, not overly emotional—showing genuine empathy for daily diabetes management impact with patients at the center; and 3) Clear, not complicated—using plain, respectful, and easy to understand language. While tone may flex slightly by context, this core voice must remain constant.
